Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Transfer Case Efficiency Energy Loss Lifetime
Work reduction gear integration value Lifetime

Item.Text: MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Histogram steel Disc temperature data Read

Test.Description: The on-board power supply voltage is too low. - Circuit Voltage Below Threshold.

There is an internal control unit fault in the processor. -

The monitoring function in the control unit has a malfunction. - Component or System Operating Conditions.
There is an internal error in the EEPROM of the control unit. - No Signal.
There is an internal error in the EEPROM of the control unit. - Data Memory Failure.
There is an internal error in the EEPROM of the control unit. - Program Memory Failure.
There is an internal error in the EEPROM of the control unit. - Invalid / Incompatible Configuration.
The internal temperature sensor of the control unit has a malfunction. - Signal Compare Failure.
The internal temperature sensor of the control unit has a malfunction. - Signal Plausibility Failure.
The internal temperature sensor of the control unit has a short circuit to ground. -
The internal temperature sensor of the control unit has a short circuit to positive. - The internal temperature sensor of the control unit has a short circuit to positive.
The clutch of the transfer case has a malfunction. - Actuator Stuck
The clutch of the transfer case has a malfunction. - Commanded Position Not Reachable
The clutch of the transfer case has a malfunction. - Alignment or Adjustment Incorrect
The clutch of the transfer case has a malfunction.-Performance or Incorrect Operation
The clutch of the transfer case has a malfunction. -Unexpected Operation
The transfer case has a mechanical malfunction. - Signal Invalid.
The transfer case has a mechanical malfunction. - Signal Stuck In Range.
The transfer case has a mechanical malfunction . - Missing Calibration.
The transfer case has a mechanical malfunction. - Not Configured.
The transfer case has a mechanical malfunction. - Signal Plausibility Failure.
The Transfer case has a mechanical malfunction. - Commanded Position Not Reachable.
The Transfer case has a mechanical malfunction. - Component Failures.
The Transfer case has a mechanical malfunction. - Component Internal Failure.
The clutch of the transfer case has a malfunction. - Component Failures.
External position sensor ''Transfer case'' has a malfunction. - FM (Frequency Modulated) /PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failure

External position sensor "Transfer case" has a malfunction. - Circuit Short To Battery.

External position sensor ''Transfer case'' has a malfunction. -Signal Bias Level Out of Range/ Zero Adjustment Failure

External position sensor ''Transfer case'' has a malfunction. - Signal Invalid
The power supply of the external position sensor "Transfercase" has a malfunction. Circuit Open.
The power supply of the external position sensor "Transfercase" has a malfunction. - Circuit Voltage Below Threshold.
The power supply of the external position sensor "Transfercase" has a malfunction. - Circuit Voltage Above Threshold.

The system base chip of the control unit has a malfunction. - Internal Electronic Failure

The system base chip of the control unit has a malfunction. - Component Internal Failure.
The system base chip of the control unit has a malfunction. - Component or System Over Temperature.
An internal control unit reset was performed. - Watchdog / Safety ?C Failure.
The temperature of the clutch is too high. - Over Temperature.
VIN Not Programmed or Incompatible
The power supply in the system is too low. -
The power supply in the system is too high. -
The on-board power supply voltage is too low. -
The on-board power supply voltage is too high.
Communication with the drivetrain CAN bus has a malfunction.- General Electrical Failure
Communication with the drivetrain CAN bus has a malfunction. - Bus OFF
Communication with the control unit ''combustion engine'' has a malfunction. -Missing Message.
Communication with control unit "Transmission" has a malfunction. - Missing Message.
An internal fault has occurred in the control unit software. - Signal Invalid.
An internal fault has occurred in the control unit software. - General Checksum Failure.
An internal fault has occurred in the control unit software. - Invalid / Incompatible Configuration.
An internal fault has occurred in the control unit software. - Missing Calibration.
An internal fault has occurred in the control unit software. - Invalid / Incompatible Configuration.
The received data are implausible. - Invalid Serial Data Received.
The received data are implausible. - Signal Above Allowable Range.
The received data are implausible. - Missing Message.
The received data are implausible. - Erratic.
Implausible data were received from control unit ''combustion engine''. - Alive / Sequence Counter Incorrect / Not Updated.
Implausible data were received from control unit ''combustion engine''. - Value of Signal Protection Calculation Incorrect.
Implausible data were received from control unit ''Transmission''. -Alive / Sequence Counter Incorrect / Not Updated.
Implausible data were received from control unit ''Transmission''. - Value of Signal Protection Calculation Incorrect.
